calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Monica Dell'Osso appeared by zoom for Alan Statman (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it will appoint Alan Statman as the Successor Trustee and that it waives bond. The Petition for Order Appointing Successor Trustee is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Continued To Aug-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
